data.summary: The exploratory step is blocked due to insufficient evidence to validate the requirement regarding compensation ledger context fields.
data.assessment: The evidence provided does not confirm whether the compensation ledger context fields are referencing staffing assignments or time segments as required. While the linked use case outlines the need for these references, there is no direct evidence from the saga run that demonstrates this requirement has been satisfied. The prior steps focus on bookings and member actions but do not address the specific validation needed for the compensation ledger context fields.
gaps: No evidence confirming that compensation ledger context fields reference staffing assignment/time segment.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the compensation ledger context fields.
